new_claims.claim_text: Trump and Israel are bombing civilian bridges and scientific institutions in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Claim of targeting civilian infrastructure and scientific institutions during conflict.

new_claims.claim_text: Russia declares it will join the war to fight alongside Iranian forces if the US launches a ground invasion.
new_claims.notes: Claim of Russian intent to intervene in Iran-US conflict.

new_claims.claim_text: Bill Gates is calling for biometric digital IDs to be tied directly to your bank account and payment systems so they can monitor your health, track farmers, and manage climate policy.
new_claims.notes: Claim about Bill Gates's advocacy for comprehensive digital IDs and surveillance.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran assures the Philippines that it will allow Philippine-bound and Philippine-flagged ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.
new_claims.notes: Claim of diplomatic assurance from Iran to the Philippines regarding maritime passage.
